parameters.sqlQuery:
WITH field_paths AS (
  SELECT field_path
  FROM `wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMN_FIELD_PATHS`
  WHERE table_name = 'retail_sku_store_date_agg'
)
SELECT
  STRING_AGG(
    DISTINCT IF(
      REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(field_path), r'(^|\.)([a-z0-9_]*state[a-z0-9_]*)$'),
      field_path,
      NULL
    ),
    '\n' ORDER BY field_path
  ) AS state_candidates,
  STRING_AGG(
    DISTINCT IF(
      REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(field_path), r'(^|\.)(sku[a-z0-9_]*|[a-z0-9_]*sku|partnumber|part_number|supplierpart[a-z0-9_]*|productid|product_id|itemid|item_id)$'),
      field_path,
      NULL
    ),
    '\n' ORDER BY field_path
  ) AS sku_candidates,
  STRING_AGG(
    DISTINCT IF(
      REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(field_path), r'(^|\.)(skuname|sku_name|productname|product_name|partname|part_name|itemname|item_name|producttitle|product_title)$'),
      field_path,
      NULL
    ),
    '\n' ORDER BY field_path
  ) AS sku_name_candidates,
  STRING_AGG(
    DISTINCT IF(
      REGEXP_CONTAINS(LOWER(field_path), r'(^|\.)(quantity|qty|units|unit_count)$'),
      field_path,
      NULL
    ),
    '\n' ORDER BY field_path
  ) AS quantity_candidates
FROM field_paths;
